/CAL: DISPOSITION/TEXT:DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS GLTY PLEA & REFRDTO DIVERSN/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/FNDG/GTW/CPSS/X: THIS IS A 6 MONTH DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT,/DEF: IS ALREADY ENROLLED IN THE PROJECT 90 RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/CTORD:  THAT IF THE DEFENDANT COMPLETES SIX MONTHS IN THEPROJECT 90 RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM, INCURS NO NEW ARREST, AND ADHERESTO THE STAY AWAY ORDER FOR THE NEXT SIX MONTHS,  THE  COURT MAY GRANT A DISMISSAL UPON PROPERFILING OF MOTION,/SA4: 75 VERNON STREET IN SAN FRANCISCO/SAORD/SATERM/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWT/CONTD:SET OR DISPO/X:THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED UNLESS NECESSARY FOR DISPO/X:DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE PROOFOF GOOD STANDING WITH PROGRAM/
